violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment does not have any Food Safety Manager registered with RIDOH. Establishment must register Food Safety Manager with RIDOH. Food Safety Manager Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the Ice Machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025
